title: Centre for Regions, Trade & Geopolitics - Home
gist: Promotional homepage for WEF's Centre for Regions, Trade and Geopolitics describing its mission and initiatives. NOTE: this is marketing/landing-page copy, not analysis; only a couple of concrete data points are extractable, so a light card.

insights.claim: WEF's Humanitarian and Resilience Investing (HRI) Initiative reports that partners made over 50 commitments that could unlock more than $15 billion in impact investment for frontier-market and crisis-hit communities.
insights.speaker: World Economic Forum
insights.so_what: A $15bn pipeline signals institutional appetite to channel private capital into frontier-market resilience; relevant for development-finance and blended-finance allocators.
insights.quote: announce over 50 commitments that will boost impact investment and could unlock over $15 billion.

insights.claim: The Centre convenes 190+ leading global companies, 40+ international organizations and 150+ civil-society groups, and is piloting sustainable investment facilitation in Cambodia, Ghana, Kenya and India to close gaps in sustainable FDI.
insights.speaker: World Economic Forum
insights.so_what: Identifies the specific emerging markets WEF is steering sustainable FDI toward — a directional signal for where multistakeholder capital is being channelled.
